title: Switch Travis from trusty to xenial
body: Request a later platform for running our tests in Travis.  Since the `flatpak` PPA includes packages for `libostree-dev`, we no longer need to build our own.  CC @lsm5

comments.body: doesn't look like it's switching to xenial, since it can't locate libostree-dev from ppa. Might be because of https://github.com/travis-ci/travis-ci/issues/5821
the key fetches in travis logs also seem to be for trusty and not xenial. I guess we can leave this hanging until travis enables xenial (or until I enable buildah ppa for trusty, ughhh)
It doesn't look like we can use xenial for sudo-requiring tests like ours, at least not yet.  We'll have to revisit this later.
